productDisplayName: Lucera Women Set of Two Silver Ring
description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with these lucera rings. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this lovely set of two and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSet of two ringsOne ring has a silver band with a drop shaped stone cluster at the centre and white stones at the sidesOne ring has a strand of encrusted white stones along the frontMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
